prompt: Review PR #4603 in DataDog/dd-trace-go. It optimizes the Knuth sampling rate formatting in the sampler to eliminate allocations.

assertions.text: Requests or notes that the PR should include benchmark comparisons (before/after) to validate the allocation improvement
Flags or notes that fmt.Sprintf / string formatting in a hot path causes allocations and recommends strconv or strings.Builder instead
Explicitly discusses or checks the allocation count (allocs/op) in the context of sampling — a hot path that runs on every span
